mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.st :: StSettleConfig :: selectById */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , vnd.vendor_nm AS vendor_nm , cat.category_nm AS category_nm , cd_sc.code_label AS settle_cycle_cd_nm FROM st_settle_config c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_vendor vnd ON vnd.vendor_id = c.vendor_id LEFT JOIN pd_category cat ON cat.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sc ON cd_sc.code_grp = 'SETTLE_CYCLE' AND cd_sc.code_value = c.settle_cycle_cd WHERE c.settle_config_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.ec.st :: StSettleConfig :: selectPageCount */ FROM st_settle_config c
